project.name: ResuMake
project.targetAudience: Fresh graduates seeking custom-tailored resumes for various computer science roles
project.portfolioAlignment: IT Software Engineer (OMS) at Hilti (XML, XSLT, JS, SQL, PDF Composition, QA Automation)

userStory.problem: Fresh graduates apply to diverse roles and must tailor their resumes while maintaining a strict 1-page or 2-page print layout constraint, which is tedious to format manually.
userStory.solution: Write career data once in an XML master pool. Use tag filtering and XSLT to compile tailored resumes dynamically, and run automated visual regression checks to verify layout boundaries.

inputInterface.behavior: Users input data via UI forms. The app automatically maps inputs to XML in the background.

smartAutoTagging.behavior: Runs real-time keyword scanning on typed text and suggests matching category tags.

dynamicFiltering.behavior: Passes selected tag checkboxes as parameters into the XSLT compiler to selectively display bullet points.

visualLayoutCheck.behavior: Captures a layout screenshot using Puppeteer. Validates the height against user-selected 1-page or 2-page limits, highlighting spillovers in red.

channels: Mock Email Copy Dispatch with PDF Attachment
